subject: Status review: meeting milestone in Auckland | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-1377
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of meeting work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-1377. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
